name: regime_rotator
description: BEP-20 Regime Rotator Skill v3. Generates institutional-grade trading strategies using the FULL CoinMarketCap Agent Hub ecosystem: 10 Skill Hub analytical skills (macro regime, KOL sentiment, derivatives, on-chain metrics, narrative rotation, chart patterns, holder risk, whale anomalies, asset structure, daily overview) + 12 Core MCP direct data tools (quotes, TA, news, derivatives, global metrics, narratives, macro events). Supports x402 autonomous payments for keyless data access. Publishes deliverables to BNB Greenfield decentralized storage. Settlement via BNB AI Agent SDK (ERC-8004 identity + ERC-8183 escrow).

investment_thesis.description: Natural language investment thesis authored by human.

target_assets.description: List of BEP-20 target assets to evaluate.

risk_tolerance.description: Risk tolerance profile (e.g., low, medium, high).

job_id.description: Optional ERC-8183 Job ID to verify escrow funding on-chain.

strategy_spec.description: The compiled machine-readable JSON strategy spec with full CMC intelligence metadata.

skill_hub_skills_used.description: List of CMC Skill Hub skills that were executed during compilation.

core_mcp_tools_used.description: List of CMC Core MCP tools called for data enrichment.

storage_urls.description: Greenfield and IPFS URLs where deliverables were published.
